name: Jussie Smollett: Anatomy of a Hoax
original_name: Jussie Smollett: Anatomy of a Hoax
overview: Describes the intrigue and drama that caused a celebrity to become despised, shocked Chicago and beyond, and left a path of destroyed reputations and careers. The Osundairo brothers will provide all the details related to the false crime.

trailers.title: Jussie Smollett: Anatomy of a Hoax | Streaming March 13
